name: spectra
description: AI-native UI automation across web, macOS, iOS, and watchOS

scripts.build:native: swiftc native/swift/Types.swift native/swift/main.swift native/swift/AppTarget.swift native/swift/AXBridge.swift native/swift/SimBridge.swift native/swift/MediaCapture.swift -framework Foundation -framework ApplicationServices -framework AppKit -framework CoreGraphics -o $HOME/.spectra/bin/spectra-native
